Returns a bulk update request object with a request ID that can be used to track the status of the operation. The actual permission changes are applied asynchronously and may take time to complete.

data.current_summary: Retrieve voice dialing permissions inheritance for the sub-account
data.current_description: Retrieve voice dialing permissions inheritance for the sub-account
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the voice dialing permissions inheritance settings for the sub-account. This operation returns the current inheritance configuration that determines whether the sub-account inherits dialing permissions from its parent account or uses its own independent permissions. Returns a settings object containing the inheritance status and related configuration.
